title: thevenotia persica
intro: Thevenotia persica, also known as Persian catmint, is a flowering plant in the mint family that is native to Iran. Traditionally, Thevenotia persica has been used for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic. The health benefits of this plant include relief from digestive issues, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory function. The herbal preparations of Thevenotia persica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
